steps.name: public-data-and-readme-boundary
steps.summary: Tracked data/sample-questions-v0.1.jsonl now contains 43 public_sample rows and 0 holdout rows; full 173-row dataset preserved locally under ignored data/private/sample-questions-full-v0.1.jsonl. README and data README rewritten for portfolio/publication boundary. Tests updated to avoid holdout-only fixture dependencies. Verification: validate_questions PASS, pytest 129 passed, package_release gate PASS with 34 publishable rows, tracked private boundary PASS, strict secret value scan PASS.
